query:
SELECT a.name AS sender, m.body, m.created_at
        FROM (
            SELECT sender_id, body, created_at
            FROM messages
            WHERE channel_id = $1 AND content_type = 1
            ORDER BY created_at DESC
            LIMIT $2
        ) m
        JOIN agents a ON a.id = m.sender_id
        ORDER BY m.created_at ASC
